---
title: "About DIG"
image: profile.jpg
---

::: {#mission}
We are an interdisciplinary research group that uses *computational and humanistic* methods to study and practice *restorative/transformative data science*.
:::

**Principal Investigator**

![](images/Stevens-headshot.JPG){width="150"}\
[Nikko Stevens](http://www.nikkostevens.com)

If you'd like to join the lab, [we're currently recruiting student researcher](collaborate.qmd)
